title: hypericum richeri subsp. alpigenum
intro: Hypericum richeri subsp. alpigenum, also known as Alpine St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and minor skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to act as an adaptogen, helping to balance the body's response to stress, as well as its potential to boost mood and reduce symptoms of depression. Alpine St. John's Wort can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to support mental and emotional well-being.
